text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, T.M. Opera O receives a fan<n>letter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This is superb!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold, Trainer! A devout fan has<n>bestowed a
most fitting portrait unto<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She shows me a crayon drawing<n>probably made
by a little kid.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's of T.M. Opera O, for sure... though<n>it looks
more like a tube with ears and<n>a tail. There's also
a bunch of<n>indigo-blue scribbles in the
background.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This sleek, elongated physique. The<n>irresistible
charm of my ears and tail...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think, such a prodigy who can<n>capture my
majestic allure exists!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And... Yes, yes... This indigo must<n>represent outer
space.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My silhouette bounding across the<n>galaxy! This
youth possesses<n>excellent taste!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am duty bound to make their vision<n>a reality!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Have you a regimen to<n>prepare me for
striding through the<n>stars?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah, I am always serious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will rise to meet the hopes and<n>dreams of the
people, no matter what<n>they may be. As with
everything, one<n>doesn't know until one tries.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After some research, I explain what<n>kinds of
astronaut training would be<n>doable here at Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But that is no different from our<n>usual
regimen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait! That could mean butone thing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I have been training to reach the stars<n>all along!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! I never miss the mark!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time to take my first step toward<n>space has
come. I shall see that<n>young girl's wish granted!

With eyes unwavering—as usual—T.M.<n>Opera O
declares her new objective.
